data.description:
## Context
The 2026-07-12 calibration analysis (session logs remarkable-hydrated-nightjar / tainted-continuing-queensnake / shaggy-linoleum-gavial) found: (1) code review is too loose — 0 'BLOCK — finding' votes across 162 post-recalibration changes while confirmed must-fix findings sailed through as advisories (change #529's untested-degradation advisory scored impact 0.0 and went red on main 57 minutes after merge; #518's importlib code-execution findings at 0.54; #539's correctness findings at 0.60 — against a 0.95 threshold no real finding ever reached); (2) plan-review advisory load is protocol-inflated — CLAUDE.md mandates remediating ALL valid advisories (~13/round, 95% of remediation edits mint new findings), and with the convergence floors now default-ON (change 562) we want to observe organic agent behavior instead of mandated remediation; (3) completion-verifier defects are structural, not admissibility: FAIL verdicts persist nowhere, FAILs ratchet piecemeal (3b4e took 2 extra CI cycles), and 'children closed (signed)' epic ACs defeat the certifiable:false escape hatch (bf50/5f39 contagion, bug 02a3).

## Success Criteria
- Code-review blocking is derived from adjudicated field data (the crossover threshold where a finding is more likely correctly-blocking than false-blocking), enabled for serious-tier criteria, and passes the ADR-0036 A/B gate before flipping.
- Agent guidance no longer MANDATES advisory remediation (loosened to judgment, NOT reversed), so post-change review rounds measure organic advisory uptake.
- Completion-verifier FAILs are durably persisted and enumerate all unmet criteria in one verdict; the signed-children AC anti-pattern is documented.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All child tickets are closed (the epic's work items).
- [ ] A follow-up measurement note (comment on this epic) records post-change field data: code-review block/false-block counts, and plan-review advisory-uptake behavior after the guidance loosening.
data.title: Review-gate calibration 2026-07-12: code-review blocking lane + advisory-guidance loosening + completion-verifier fixes
